enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Laila Laila?

The song is a peppy and energetic number that celebrates youthful exuberance and playful romance.

Who is the singer of Laila Laila?

The song is sung by Andrea Jeremiah.

Who composed the music for Settai?

The music for Settai was composed by Thaman S.

What is the release year of Settai?

The movie Settai was released in 2013.

What role does Laila Laila play in the movie?

The song adds a lively and entertaining element to the film, enhancing its fun and youthful vibe.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Laila Laila is a lively and energetic song from the movie Settai, capturing the playful essence of youthful romance. Sung by Andrea Jeremiah, the track features catchy beats composed by Thaman S and vibrant lyrics by Na Muthukumar. The song is set in a fun and celebratory context within the film, adding to its overall entertainment value. It evokes feelings of joy and excitement, making it a perfect choice for parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Laila Laila from the movie Settai is a vibrant and energetic track that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With Andrea Jeremiah's lively vocals and Thaman S's catchy beats, this song is a must-listen for anyone looking to add a spark to their playlist. Dive into the playful lyrics penned by Na Muthukumar and experience the magic of this unforgettable number.
stanzaMeanings: Laila, you're sweating in style, in your eyes, ears, and nose.
When I touch, there's no intoxication; when my finger touches, there's no intoxication. When I touch, it suddenly releases ghosts.
This is not a love game, there's no work for this. A hundred faces come to cuddle me, but no one is permanent.
Laila, you're asking for rent to stay in your heart.
How many languages are there? For me, it's like leaving words at home and staying silent.
Here, you will see only one thing, what is inside is as it is.
When I touch, there's no intoxication; when my finger touches, there's no intoxication. When I touch, it suddenly releases ghosts.
This is not a love game, there's no work for this. A hundred faces come to cuddle me, but no one is permanent.
